project.name: OTA Update Agent Subsystem
project.description:
The OTA update agent subsystem verifies and applies signed firmware on the machine,
rolling back on validation failure. It is a leaf system of the connected coffee fleet,
hosted on the fleet edge gateway.

trustZones.name: System Boundary
trustZones.description: Default trust zone for components without explicit boundary mapping.

components.name: OTA Apply
components.description: Applies verified firmware and rolls back on failure.

components.name: OTA Verification
components.description: Verifies firmware signature and update eligibility.
